infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for recording presentations.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your location to verify field visits and attendance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to share your work location with your manager while you are punched in, even in the background.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for recording presentations.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to capture verification selfies.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to share your work location with your manager while you are punched in, even in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your location to verify field visits and attendance.
